app.title: Nomad Braid
app.tagline: Afro hair, braids, wigs, nails & makeup — at home or in-salon.
section.hero.title: Nomad Braid
section.hero.subtitle: We bring curated afro hair professionals to your home or favorite salon, at discovery prices.
section.why.title: Why Nomad Braid
section.why.body: Nomad Braid is a popup service that lets you try new braiders, wig makers, nail artists and makeup artists — safely, conveniently, and at discovery prices. Tell us how you dress your hair today so we can craft the right launch for you.
